describe('pull partial pipeline with 3 through-streams', () => {
  it('correctly applies 3 transforms in sequence', (done) => {
    const pipeline = pull(
      pull.map((x: number) => x * 2),
      pull.filter((x: number) => x > 2),
      pull.map((x: number) => x + 10)
    )

    pull(
      pull.values([1, 2, 3, 4]),
      pipeline,
      pull.collect((err: any, result: number[]) => {
        expect(err).toBeNull()
        expect(result).toEqual([14, 16, 18])
        done()
      })
    )
  })
})
